title: How I Used Claude Code to Build a $481k App
summary: Austin Marchese demonstrates using Claude Code to build a revenue-generating product from zero code to 100,000 users in 45 days without prior coding experience. The video covers five practical steps: starting with the problem, knowing where to engineer versus use existing solutions, learning technical vocabulary, building methodically, and testing for breakage.
